results.rendered_html:
sāmudrika a. (kī f.) [samudreṇa proktaṃ vettyadhīte vā ṭhañ]
1 Sea-born, oceanic.
2 Relating to marks on
(pb) the body (which are supposed to indicate good or bad fortune).
— kaḥ
1 One who is acquainted with palmistry, who knows how to interpret the various marks on the body.
2 A fortune-teller.
— kaṃ The science of palmistry.
